message:
fix(theme): resolve colorblind theme color collisions and test regression

- user role: #7aa2f7 → #7dcfff (cyan) — was identical to agent (#7aa2f7),
  making user/assistant messages indistinguishable
- system role: #bb9af7 → #d09af7 (light magenta) — was identical to
  accent_alt and error, reducing visual distinctiveness
- error semantic: #bb9af7 → #d09af7 — same fix, distinct from accent_alt
- Fix preset_cycling_wraps test: start from Colorblind (now last preset),
  not HighContrast
- Add "cvd" serde alias for config file compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -960,10 +960,10 @@ impl ThemePalette {
             surface: colors::BG_SURFACE,                       // #24283b (unchanged)
             hint: colors::TEXT_MUTED,                           // #696e9e (unchanged)
             border: colors::BORDER,                             // #3b4261 (unchanged)
-            user: PackedRgba::rgb(122, 162, 247),              // #7aa2f7 blue (was green #9ece6a)
-            agent: colors::ROLE_AGENT,                         // #7aa2f7 (unchanged)
+            user: PackedRgba::rgb(125, 207, 255),              // #7dcfff cyan (was green #9ece6a — distinct from agent blue)
+            agent: colors::ROLE_AGENT,                         // #7aa2f7 blue (unchanged)
             tool: PackedRgba::rgb(224, 175, 104),              // #e0af68 yellow (was orange #ff9e64)
-            system: PackedRgba::rgb(187, 154, 247),            // #bb9af7 magenta (was red-ish #e0af68)
+            system: PackedRgba::rgb(208, 154, 247),            // #d09af7 light magenta (was amber #e0af68 — distinct from accent_alt/error)
             stripe_even: colors::BG_DEEP,                      // #1a1b26
             stripe_odd: PackedRgba::rgb(30, 32, 48),           // #1e2030
         }

@@ -100,7 +100,7 @@ pub enum UiThemePreset {
     Nightfox,
     CyberpunkAurora,
     Synthwave84,
-    #[serde(alias = "cb")]
+    #[serde(alias = "cb", alias = "cvd")]
     Colorblind,
 }
 
@@ -1435,8 +1435,8 @@ fn colorblind_theme() -> Theme {
         .success(Color::rgb(125, 207, 255)) // #7dcfff cyan (was green #73daca)
         // warning → warm yellow (was amber, still yellow family but brighter)
         .warning(Color::rgb(224, 175, 104)) // #e0af68 (unchanged, already CB-safe)
-        // error → magenta/purple instead of red
-        .error(Color::rgb(187, 154, 247)) // #bb9af7 (was red #f7768e)
+        // error → light magenta instead of red (distinct from accent_alt #bb9af7)
+        .error(Color::rgb(208, 154, 247)) // #d09af7 (was red #f7768e)
         .build()
 }
